candidate.name: pure_cublas_three_sgemm
candidate.strategy: Replace ATen matmul/transpose/add path with three direct cuBLAS SGEMMs, eliminate explicit B.T materialization, and fold the rank-16 add into the final SGEMM via beta=1; expected small but real launch and memory-traffic reduction versus baseline while retaining cuBLAS for the dominant dxd GEMM.
